# ColourMap
> AI-powered clarity coaching through a living visual canvas of life alignment

## Purpose
ColourMap helps users navigate life decisions through conversational AI coaching and a generative visual canvas. It maps three life spaces (health, connection, purpose) into an evolving visual representation, surfacing alignment patterns, tensions, and growth areas. Target users: individuals seeking clarity and self-awareness through reflective dialogue.

## Architecture
- **App**: Next.js 16 (App Router) at `packages/apps/web-colourmap-application/`
- **Bundle**: `packages/bundles/colourmap-product/` (application/, domain/, infrastructure/, presentation/)
- **Contracts**: `packages/libs/contracts-colourmap-product/` (13 commands, queries, events)
- **Database**: `packages/libs/database-colourmap-product/` (Prisma + Supabase)
- **Layer flow**: app -> bundle -> contracts/database (no reverse)

## API Surface

### REST Endpoints (base: `/api/`)
- `POST /api/chat` - AI coaching interaction (Anthropic Claude)
- `GET /api/state` - Full user state (space states, drift, principles, focus)
- `PATCH /api/state` - Update state
- `GET /api/state/history` - Time-series alignment per space
- `GET /api/state/history/all` - All spaces history
- `GET /api/sessions` - List coaching sessions
- `GET /api/sessions/:id/messages` - Session messages
- `POST /api/sessions/:id/summary` - Generate session summary (AI)
- `PATCH /api/sessions/:id/summary` - Correct summary
- `GET /api/principles` - List principles
- `POST /api/principles` - Create principle
- `PATCH /api/principles/:id` - Update principle
- `DELETE /api/principles/:id` - Delete principle
- `GET /api/practices` - List practices
- `POST /api/practices` - Create practice
- `PATCH /api/practices/:id` - Update practice status
- `GET /api/focus` - List focus items
- `POST /api/focus` - Create focus item
- `PATCH /api/focus/:id` - Update focus item
- `GET /api/compass` - Latest compass reading
- `POST /api/compass` - Generate compass reading (AI)
- `POST /api/journal` - Ingest journal entry (AI extraction)
- `GET /api/patterns` - Cross-session patterns
- `POST /api/voice/transcribe` - STT (Mistral Voxtral)
- `POST /api/voice/synthesize` - TTS (ElevenLabs)
- `GET /api/voice/voices` - Available TTS voices
- `GET /api/data` - Export user data
- `DELETE /api/data` - Delete user data

### Auth
- `POST /api/auth/*` - Better Auth (session-based)

## MCP Tools (12 tools, 3 resources, 3 prompts)

### Tools
- `colourmap.mcp.state.get` - Full state with space states, drift, principles, focus
- `colourmap.mcp.state.history` - Time-series alignment for a life space
- `colourmap.mcp.sessions.list` - All coaching sessions
- `colourmap.mcp.session.messages` - Messages for a session
- `colourmap.mcp.principles.list` - Principles, optionally by space
- `colourmap.mcp.principle.create` - Create principle in a life space
- `colourmap.mcp.practices.list` - Practices, optionally by space
- `colourmap.mcp.practice.create` - Create practice in a life space
- `colourmap.mcp.focus.list` - Focus items, optionally by space
- `colourmap.mcp.focus.create` - Create focus item in a life space
- `colourmap.mcp.compass.get` - Latest compass reading with freshness
- `colourmap.mcp.compass.generate` - Generate compass from current state

### Resources
- `colourmap://spaces` - Three life spaces: health, connection, purpose
- `colourmap://coach/persona` - Coach: warm, direct, curious (Tara Brach-inspired)
- `colourmap://api/routes` - All HTTP API endpoints

### Prompts
- `colourmap.coach.checkin` - Daily check-in across three life spaces
- `colourmap.coach.explore` - Deep-dive space exploration
- `colourmap.coach.compass` - Holistic compass reading synthesis

### MCP Endpoints
- `POST /api/mcp/colourmap/*` - Domain MCP (Streamable HTTP)
- `POST /api/mcp/docs/*` - DocBlocks MCP

## AI Integration
- **Coach model**: Anthropic Claude (`claude-sonnet-4-6`)
- **Coach persona**: Warm, direct, curious clarity coach. Kind, not nice. Never diagnoses.
- **Safety**: Crisis escalation protocol, not-therapy boundaries
- **Priority system**: acute > staleness > misalignment > pattern > broadening
- **Voice**: Mistral Voxtral (STT), ElevenLabs (TTS)
- **Output format**: JSON (response + stateDeltas + suggestedFocus + suggestedPrinciple)

## Authentication
- **Provider**: Better Auth + Supabase anonymous auth
- **OAuth**: Google, Apple, Microsoft, LinkedIn

## Data Model
- **Three spaces**: health, connection, purpose
- **State per space**: attention (0-100), alignment (0-100), tone, tensions[]
- **Principles**: Confirmed values anchoring coaching (per space)
- **Practices**: Actionable behaviors tied to principles
- **Focus items**: Active growth areas (max 3 active)
- **Sessions**: Coaching conversations with message history
- **Compass**: Cross-space pattern synthesis (cached 24h)
- **Contracts**: `@contractspec/lib.contracts-colourmap-product`

## Feature Flags
- Convention: UPPERCASE_WITH_UNDERSCORE (PostHog)

## Environment
- Dev: `localhost:3000`
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Analytics: PostHog EU (proxied via `/ingest/`)
- Deploys: Vercel

## Specs
- Vision: `specs/04_PROJECT_C_COLOURMAP/00_VISION.md`
- Coach persona: `specs/04_PROJECT_C_COLOURMAP/03_COACH_PERSONA.md`
- State schema: `specs/04_PROJECT_C_COLOURMAP/19_STATE_SCHEMA_V0.md`
- Canvas mapping: `specs/04_PROJECT_C_COLOURMAP/20_CANVAS_VISUAL_MAPPING.md`
